texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: A major advance in Reverse Osmosis Technology Disc Tube ™  Module System
texts.text: A major advance in Reverse Osmosis Technology Disc Tube ™  Module System

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Natural osmosis occurs when two fluids of different salinity are separated by a semipermeable membrane. The fluid with the lower salinity will pass through the membrane until the salt solution becomes equal on both sides of the membrane.
texts.text: Natural osmosis occurs when two fluids of different salinity are separated by a semipermeable membrane. The fluid with the lower salinity will pass through the membrane until the salt solution becomes equal on both sides of the membrane.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If pressure is exerted on the higher salinity solution the membrane allows desalinated, de-mineralized water to pass into the pure solution whilst it rejects the dissolved impurities, a process known as 'reverse osmosis' (RO).
texts.text: If pressure is exerted on the higher salinity solution the membrane allows desalinated, de-mineralized water to pass into the pure solution whilst it rejects the dissolved impurities, a process known as 'reverse osmosis' (RO).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Pall Disc Tube (DT) module system is a membrane device designed to ensure molecular and ionic separation of the whole spectrum of pollutants in all aqueous environments: from suspended matter to the smallest ions, including colloids, bacteria, viruses and organic matter.
texts.text: The Pall Disc Tube (DT) module system is a membrane device designed to ensure molecular and ionic separation of the whole spectrum of pollutants in all aqueous environments: from suspended matter to the smallest ions, including colloids, bacteria, viruses and organic matter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Disc Tube module consists of a stack of molded ABS spacing discs separating membrane cushions which are formed from three octagonal layers which are welded to each other, ultrasonically at their periphery.
texts.text: The Disc Tube module consists of a stack of molded ABS spacing discs separating membrane cushions which are formed from three octagonal layers which are welded to each other, ultrasonically at their periphery.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The unique configuration of the Disc Tube module offers numerous advantages over traditional spiral or tubular membrane modules.
texts.text: The unique configuration of the Disc Tube module offers numerous advantages over traditional spiral or tubular membrane modules.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·   High turbulances of the feed stream
texts.text: High turbulances of the feed stream

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·   Reduced risks of clogging or crystallization
texts.text: Reduced risks of clogging or crystallization

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·   Evenly distributed and self-cleaning hydraulic circulation
texts.text: Evenly distributed and self-cleaning hydraulic circulation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·   Extended range of cut-off for nanofiltration membranes (500 g/mole, 270 g/mole) and for reverse osmosis (high flow rates, Standard 100 g/mole, high rejection)
texts.text: Extended range of cut-off for nanofiltration membranes (500 g/mole, 270 g/mole) and for reverse osmosis (high flow rates, Standard 100 g/mole, high rejection)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·   Desalination of brackish water or sea water at ends of production of potable water
texts.text: Desalination of brackish water or sea water at ends of production of potable water

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What are the main challenges in the leachate treatment process?
texts.text: What are the main challenges in the leachate treatment process?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · COD in landfill leachate is partially not biodegradable ('Hard COD')
texts.text: COD in landfill leachate is partially not biodegradable ('Hard COD')

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · COD cannot be reduced sufficiently by classical Biological treatment, e.g. in public WWTP's
texts.text: COD cannot be reduced sufficiently by classical Biological treatment, e.g. in public WWTP's

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · High ammonia and total nitrogen contents require utmost treatment efficiency
texts.text: High ammonia and total nitrogen contents require utmost treatment efficiency

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Salt content and heavy metals cannot be eliminated by conventional treatment methods
texts.text: Salt content and heavy metals cannot be eliminated by conventional treatment methods

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Conclusion : Reverse Osmosis is the only technology, capable of reducing almost all parameters!
texts.text: Conclusion : Reverse Osmosis is the only technology, capable of reducing almost all parameters!

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Characteristics of Pall's DT RO Systems for Landfill leachate treatment
texts.text: Characteristics of Pall's DT RO Systems for Landfill leachate treatment

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Reliable at variations of quantity and quality
texts.text: Reliable at variations of quantity and quality

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Switch On / Switch Off operation possible
texts.text: Switch On / Switch Off operation possible

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Treated leachate (permeate) can be discharged back to the environment or can be utilized for irrigation or process water.
texts.text: Treated leachate (permeate) can be discharged back to the environment or can be utilized for irrigation or process water.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In leachate treatment and most waste water applications as a rough design value, the average output per module is 3 m³/day of pure water with a mean conversion rate varying from 75 % at medium pressure to 90 - 95 % at high pressure.
texts.text: In leachate treatment and most waste water applications as a rough design value, the average output per module is 3 m³/day of pure water with a mean conversion rate varying from 75 % at medium pressure to 90 - 95 % at high pressure.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Value for DTGE Modules with Raw water conductivity is 10 - 15 ms/cm @ 25 °C
texts.text: Value for DTGE Modules with Raw water conductivity is 10 - 15 ms/cm @ 25 °C
